scenario: Rails (or Django/Spring) monolith with anemic domain models — services contain all logic, entities are dataclasses
when_to_pick: You suspect business rules have leaked out of entities into service classes and want a structured pass

scenario: Starting a new Go (or Java/.NET) service with two bounded contexts and unclear seam between them
when_to_pick: You're at greenfield and want the seam decided before code is written

scenario: Existing service has direct DB calls in handlers; want to introduce ports/adapters without a rewrite
when_to_pick: You need a sequenced refactor plan that's reversible at each step

scenario: Team is new to the codebase and needs ports-and-adapters / hexagonal explained against the actual structure
when_to_pick: You want a grounded explainer that cites this codebase, not a textbook
